title: Verify 'Loss Aversion' Screen and Reminder Nudge
description: Test the UI and functionality of the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up when a user first attempts to cancel.
preconditions: User has an active trial with 6 days remaining.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub and click 'Cancel Trial'.
3. Verify the headline and body copy match the PRD, correctly stating '6 days'.
4. Click the primary action 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder'.

expected_result: The pop-up appears with the correct copy and visual prominence for actions. Clicking the primary action dismisses the pop-up, sets the reminder, and keeps the trial active. The 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with 'cancel pop-up' as the source.
